sizing_rule.note: Add next contract only when equity reaches geometric mean threshold (Equation 2.03). Do NOT reduce contracts during equity declines. This is a suboptimal alternative to trading full optimal f; yields lower asymptotic returns and larger drawdowns.

source_rule_text: Do not trim back the number of contracts during equity declines; instead, add the next contract only when equity reaches the geometric mean threshold, though this approach yields lower asymptotic returns and larger drawdowns compared to trading full optimal f.
